description: TWO PLAY NETS 7 FOR RED CROSS On Friday evening July 30th Gloria Puro of 75 Park Avenue assisted by Phyllis Crelan of 86 Park Avenue put on a play pro ceeds amounting to 700 were turned over to the Red Cross Those participating in the sever al singing dancing and instru mental playing numbers were Gloria Puro Phyllis Crelan Yvette and Bobby Moreau Jo seph Puro Timothy Moynihan Annette Dellaripa Peggy Ann Roberto Rita Bouffard and Irene Bailes Costumes and all ar rangements were made by Gloria Puro and Phyllis Crelan War Stamps Dont forget your war stamps at the Burnside School every Wednesday from 11 to 12 oclock Enjoy almost in stant relief from the KA I discomfort of over I IS exposure to the sun Soothes nonpoison ous insect bites and many minor skin ir ritations too NeKsSKB THE HARTFORD DRUG CO Robert Rubin Shirley Rubin Registered Pharmacists 943 MAIN STREET EAST HARTFORD 83706 83738 Open 7 A M to 10 P M Saturday Until 12 F J BJ t Ji Imtt Cottons For Late Vacationers Sizes 952 500 to 795 COTTONS SEERSUCKERS BEMBERG SHEERS SILK JERSEYS GINGHAMS Lucille Shop Open Evenings 1171 Main Street East Hartford
